words.english_definition: Decomposition into components in order to study (a complex thing, concept, theory etc.).
examples: Statistical analysis of the data revealed interesting patterns.
The analysis of the poem took several hours.

words.chinese_definition: 坚持不懈的；持续的；固执的
words.english_definition: Obstinately refusing to give up or let go.
examples: She has had a persistent cough for weeks.
There was a persistent knocking on the door.
There have been persistent rumours for years.

words.chinese_definition: 有弹性的；适应力强的；坚韧的
words.english_definition: (organisms or people, of systems) Returning quickly to normal after damaging events or conditions.
examples: Children are often more resilient than adults.
The economy proved resilient during the crisis.
She showed resilient determination in the face of adversity.
